about-outline:
Outline is a product by the Outline Foundation that lets anyone create, run, and share access to their own VPN. Outline is designed to be resistant to blocking. Visit getoutline.org to learn how to get started.

Outline is open source software powered by Shadowsocks. You can contribute to the code on GitHub and join the conversation on Reddit.
add-access-key-dialog-help-text: Need a new access key? Create one at {openLink}our website{closeLink}.
auto-connect-dialog-detail: Unless you disconnect from your Outline server, Outline will automatically connect next time you restart your device.
basic-access-content:
Outline Basic Access is an alternative way to connect to the open internet. It offers limited protection of your internet traffic. This approach will make it harder for outside observers to see what you connect to online, without the use of a VPN (proxy) server.

This feature may help you connect to the open internet if you do not have a traditional Outline VPN access key, or if your VPN access key is not successfully connecting. Learn more (TBD)
basic-access-splash-title: A New Way to Get Online
connection-confirm-checkbox-label: Allow Outline to connect me to the internet with limited protection
dns-select-description: Outline Basic Access protects you from DNS attacks. Choose which DNS over HTTPs server you’d like to use. Learn more (TBD)
error-connection-configuration: Invalid configuration. Screenshot the error details and send them to your access key provider.
error-connection-configuration-fetch: Failed to download the server configuration. Screenshot the error details and send them to your access key provider.
error-connection-proxy: Failed to connect. Please check your internet connectivity, then screenshot the error details and send them to your access key provider.
error-invalid-access-key: Invalid access key. Please try again, or submit feedback for help.
error-server-incompatible: Sorry, this access key is not compatible with this version of Outline.
error-timeout: Something seems to be taking longer than expected. Quitting and restarting may help. If this happens again, please submit feedback.
error-unexpected: Sorry, an unexpected error occurred. Quitting and restarting may help. If this happens again, please submit feedback.
non-system-vpn-warning-detail: Most browsers connect automatically with Outline, some do not.
outline-plugin-error-admin-permissions: Outline needs admin permissions in order to be initialized. If you don't have admin permissions, please try again after restarting your computer or ask your system administrator for help.
outline-plugin-error-antivirus: It seems like your antivirus software is preventing us from successfully connecting.
outline-plugin-error-invalid-server-cred: It seems like your access key is not valid. If this happens again, please contact the person who gave it to you.
outline-plugin-error-routing-tables: We were not able to configure your routing tables successfully. If this happens again, please contact us.
outline-plugin-error-server-unreachable: We can’t seem to connect to your server. Please check that you are connected to the internet and try again.
outline-plugin-error-system-configuratio: Sorry, it looks like Outline is not properly installed. Please try installing it again. If that doesn't work, please submit feedback through the app.
outline-plugin-error-udp-forwarding-not-: It seems like this server doesn’t support UDP forwarding. If this happens again, please contact the person who gave you access.
outline-plugin-error-unsupported-routing: It seems like another VPN is active. Please disconnect it and try again.
outline-plugin-error-vpn-permission-not-: Outline needs your permission to set up a VPN connection to the server. Please try again, or submit feedback if you need help.
outline-services-installation-confirmati: We will initialize Outline, which may require admin permissions. Would you like to proceed?
outline-services-installation-failed: Unfortunately we are not able to initialize Outline, please submit feedback through the app.
outline-services-installed: Outline has been successfully initialized, please try again to connect to the server.
privacy-text: Some technical information is sent if you submit feedback, if there’s an app error or crash, or if your server administrator opts in to share anonymous server usage data.
privacy-title: Outline will never collect your personal information
proxyless-confirm-dialog-content:
This key uses an alternative way to connect to the open internet. It offers limited protection of your internet traffic. This approach will make it harder for outside observers to see what you connect to online, without the use of a VPN (proxy) server.

To learn more, contact the person who gave you this access key.
server-add-instructions: Copy and paste an access key to add a server.
server-add-invalid: {openLine}Invalid access key.{closeLine}Enter a valid access key (ss://) to add a server.
server-complete-protection-info-dialog-c: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Cras eu fermentum odio, sed laoreet sem. Integer in hendrerit ligula, eget pellentesque velit. Maecenas id orci eu sapien efficitur accumsan.
server-create-your-own:
Don’t have an access key?
Create your own at {openLink}our website{closeLink}.
server-create-your-own-zero-state:
Don’t have a server?
Create your own with the {openLink}Outline Manager{closeLink}.
server-create-your-own-zero-state-access:
Don’t have a server?
Create your own at {openLink}our website{closeLink} or
request an {openLink2}access key{closeLink}.
server-detected: Please confirm that you want to add this server.
server-proxyless-info-dialog-content:
This access key offers access to the open internet with limited protection.

With this key—
  • Outline will not send any of your traffic to the internet by way of a VPN (proxy) server.
  • Alternative (proxyless) methods will be applied to make the traffic less identifiable to outside observers.

This key may help you connect to the open internet if your VPN access key is not successfully connecting.
server-split-tunneling-info-dialog-conte:
This key offers limited protection when connecting to the open internet. Outline will bypass the VPN (proxy) server in certain cases.

  • For some connections, Outline will connect directly to the internet.
  • For some connections, Outline will use an alternative method to make it hard for others to see what you connect to.

This key may help you connect to the open internet if your VPN access key is not successfully connecting.
split-confirm-dialog-content:
This key offers limited protection when connecting to the open internet. Outline will bypass the VPN (proxy) server in certain cases.
  • For some connections, Outline will connect directly to the internet.
  • For some connections, Outline will use an alternative method to make it hard for others to see what you connect to.
This key may help you connect to the open internet if your VPN access key is not successfully connecting.

To learn more, contact the person who gave you this access key.
update-downloaded: An updated version of Outline has been downloaded. It will be installed when you restart Outline.
